passive.name: Z-Drive Resonance
passive.description: Every third attack or damaging spell on the same target deals bonus magic damage, and grants Ekko a burst of speed if the target is a champion.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Resonance:}} '''Ekko's''' [[basic attack]]s {{tip|on-hit}} and damaging [[Champion ability|abilities]] apply a [[stack]] of ''Resonance'' to enemies hit for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 3 times. The third stack consumes them all to deal {{pp|30 to 80 by 10; 80 to 140|color=magic damage}} {{as|(+ 90% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}. ''Z-Drive Resonance'' deals 300% damage against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Resonance'' cannot affect the same target more than once every few seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Innate - Stolen Time:}} Triggering ''Resonance'' against a {{tip|champion}} grants '''Ekko''' {{pp|key=%|50 to 80 for 4|1 to 16|color=movement speed}} {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for {{pp|2 to 3 for 3|1 to 11}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Ekko's''' basic attacks have different animations based on how many stacks his target has. His attack pattern is as follows: 
** {{tt|Downwards|first stack}} → {{tt|Upwards|second stack}} → {{tt|Sideways|third stack to consume all stacks}}
*** If the target has already been affected by ''Resonance'', '''Ekko's''' basic attack animations will kick or attack the target sideways.
* ''Resonance'' stacks will not be applied nor consumed if the basic attack is {{tip|dodged}} or {{tip|blocked}} or if the attack {{tip|blind|misses}}.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Ekko|Ekko's}} basic attacks and damaging abilities apply stacks, the third stack deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}. If the target was a {{tip|champion}}, this grants {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} to '''Ekko'''.

Q.name: Timewinder
Q.description: Ekko throws a temporal grenade that expands into a time-distortion field upon hitting an enemy champion, slowing and damaging anyone caught inside. After a delay, the grenade rewinds back to Ekko, dealing damage on its return.
Q.tooltip: Ekko throws a device dealing {{ initialdamage }} magic damage. On hitting a champion or reaching the end of its range, it expands into a field that Slows enemies inside by {{ e2 }}%. After it expands, Ekko recalls it, dealing {{ recalldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ekko''' throws a temporal grenade in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: At 700 units or upon hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}}, the grenade slows down for {{fd|1.75}} seconds to gradually expand into a ''Temporal Sickness'' field that {{tip|slows}} nearby enemies, travelling for another 190 units.
wiki_detail.description3: Afterwards, the grenade contracts and homes back to '''Ekko''' at an increased speed, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|40 to 140}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|70+40 to 130+140}} {{as|(+ 90% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Enemies can be hit only once per pass.''
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ekko}} throws a temporal grenade that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. It expands at max range or upon hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}}, {{tip|slow|slowing}} nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb2: After a delay, the grenade homes back to '''Ekko''', dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.

W.name: Parallel Convergence
W.description: Ekko's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage to low health enemies. He can cast Parallel Convergence to split the timeline, creating an anomaly after a few seconds that slows enemies caught inside. If Ekko enters the anomaly, he gains shielding and stuns enemies by suspending them in time.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Ekko's Attacks against enemies below 30% Health deal {{ missinghealthpercent }} missing Health magic damage.

Active: Ekko launches a chronosphere lasting 1.5 seconds after a delay that Slows enemies inside by {{ e0 }}%. If Ekko enters the sphere, he detonates it, Stunning for {{ e2 }} seconds and gaining {{ totalshield }} Shield.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Ekko's''' basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to {{as|3% {{as|(+ 3% per 100 AP)}} of the target's '''missing''' health|health}} against enemies below {{sti|health|{{as|30% of their '''maximum''' health}}}}. The damage has a minimum threshold of 15 and is capped at 150 against {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ekko''' creates an afterimage of himself that, after 2 seconds, bats a device to the target location and grants {{tip|sight}} of the area for {{fd|2.5}} seconds. After travelling over {{fd|1.25}} seconds, the device expands into a chronosphere that is visible for {{fd|1.5}} seconds and which {{tip|slows}} enemies within by 40%.
wiki_detail.description3: If '''Ekko''' enters the sphere within 2 seconds of its creation, it detonates to grant him a {{tip|shield}} for 2 seconds and {{tip|stun}} enemies within for {{fd|2.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Enemies can see the indicator for Parallel Convergence 2 seconds after casting.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|proc damage}} for the passive.
* The passive will proc with the attack that triggers the final stack of {{ai|Z-Drive Resonance|Ekko|Resonance}} if it reduces a target's health below the 30% threshold.
* '''Ekko''' can detonate the expansion even while {{tip|untargetable}} (i.e. {{ais|Chronobreak|Ekko}} dash), but not if he is {{tip|resurrection|resurrecting}}.
* ''Parallel Convergence'' will continue to {{tip|slow}} enemies even if its expansion is detonated.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{cis|Ekko}} basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} against a {{as|low-health}} target, increased based on {{as|their '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ekko''' indicates the target location where a sphere will be created, which {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies within.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If '''Ekko''' enters the sphere, it detonates, {{tip|stun|stunning}} enemies within and granting '''Ekko''' a {{sti|shield}}.

E.name: Phase Dive
E.description: Ekko rolls evasively while charging up his Z-Drive. His next attack deals bonus damage and warps reality, teleporting him to his target.
E.tooltip: Ekko dashes and empowers his next Attack to have bonus range, teleport him to his target, and deal an additional {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ekko''' {{tip|dashes}} in the target direction, then empowers his next basic attack within 3 seconds to have a {{fd|0.25}}-second cast time, gain {{sti|range|300 '''bonus''' range}}, cause him to {{tip|blink}} within {{tt|125|Estimated}} range of the target, and deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Phase Dive {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Ekko's''' basic attack timer. '''Ekko''' can cast any of his abilities during the dash.''
wiki_detail.target range: {{tt|325|Dash distance}} / {{tt|550|Maximum increased dash distance across terrain}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The {{tip|dash}} distance can be extended to up-to 550 units when targeting across terrain. It will only extend for the distance needed to cross the wall.
* While {{tip|ground|grounded}} or {{tip|root|rooted}}, '''Ekko''' loses the {{sti|'''bonus''' attack range}} from ''Phase Dive''.
* ''Phase Drive's'' attack can be {{tip|blocked}} or {{tip|dodged}}, consuming the basic attack without dealing any damage. If the attack {{tip|blind|misses}}, the same will happen.
* If the target becomes {{tip|untargetable}}, {{tip|death|dies}}, or is too far away during the empowered attack's cast time, it is cancelled but not consumed.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ekko}} {{tip|dash|rolls}} in the target direction, gaining {{sti|range|'''bonus''' attack range}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: His next {{tip|basic attack}} {{tip|blink|blinks}} him to the target and deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.

R.name: Chronobreak
R.description: Ekko shatters his timeline, becoming untargetable and rewinding to a more favorable point in time. He returns to whenever he was a few seconds ago, and heals for a percentage of the damage received in that duration. Enemies near his arrival zone take massive damage.
R.tooltip: Ekko turns back time, entering Stasis while teleporting to where he was 4 seconds ago and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to nearby enemies. In addition, Ekko restores {{ totalbaseheal }} Health, increased by {{ percenthealampperpercentmissinghealth }}% for each 1% Health he lost in last 4 seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} Upon learning ''Chronobreak'' or if its '''current''' cooldown is lower than 4 seconds, '''Ekko''' reveals a time-delayed ''afterimage'' of himself that constantly tracks where he was 4 seconds ago.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ekko''' enters {{tip|stasis (buff)|stasis}} at the start of the cast time, and afterwards {{tip|heals}} himself and {{tip|dash|dashes}} to his ''afterimage's'' current location over {{fd|0.5}} seconds. Upon arrival, the stasis ends and he creates an explosion that deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|200 to 500}} {{as|(+ 175% AP)}}}}{{st|Heal|{{ap|100 to 200}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}} (+ 3% ''per {{as|1% of health}} lost in the past 4 seconds'')}}
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Ekko''' is immune to all {{tip|airborne|displacements}} during Chronobreak''.
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Ekko''' will attempt to basic attack the closest target after appearing at the cast location, but can do so quicker if he manually attack commands after the dash, except if {{ai|Phase Dive|Ekko}} is primed.
* The ''afterimage's'' location will explode even if '''Ekko's''' {{tip|dash}} is interrupted.
* The ''afterimage'' is always visible to '''Ekko''' and his allies. To enemies, the ''afterimage'' can only be seen if they {{tip|sight}} of it.
* A ''link'' can also be seen between the ''afterimage'' and '''Ekko''' that traces along his path.
** The ''link'' follows the same visibility rules as the ''afterimage''.
** Upon activation, '''Ekko''' travels full distance through the ''link'', and thus will detonate {{ai|Parallel Convergence|Ekko}} that the ''link'' passes through.
* [[File: Quicksilver Sash item.png|20px|link=]] {{nie|Quicksilver}} is placed on a 1-second {{sti|cooldown}} upon casting ''Chronobreak''.
wiki_detail.tips:
* The ''afterimage'' instantly spawns upon learning ''Chronobreak''. This may be used once per match for a ''stealth'' ''Chronobreak'' usage.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Ekko}} reveals a time-delayed ''afterimage'' of himself that tracks where he was 4 seconds ago.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ekko''' enters {{tip|stasis}} and {{tip|dash|rewinds}} to the ''afterimage'', {{as|{{sti|healing}}}} based on the damage received in the last 4 seconds. He then explodes, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
